content:
Q: What is the key idea about highlight 1? A: HTML: HyperText Markup Language | MDN Skip to main content Skip to search HTML: HyperText Markup Language HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the most basic building block of the Web. Q: What is the key idea about it defines the meaning and structure of web? A: It defines the meaning and structure of web content. Q: What is the key idea about other technologies besides html are generally used to? A: Other technologies besides HTML are generally used to describe a web page's appearance/presentation ( CSS ) or functionality/behavior ( JavaScript ). Q: What is the key idea about hypertext refers to links that connect web pages? A: "Hypertext" refers to links that connect web pages to one another, either within a single website or between websites. Q: What is the key idea about links are a fundamental aspect of the web? A: Links are a fundamental aspect of the Web. Q: What is the key idea about div span img aside audio canvas datalist details? A: div> , , ,
,
